column1: # OWASP ZAP — False-positive suppression rules for VoyageAI
# 10021  X-Content-Type-Options set at CDN, not origin server
# 10023  /dashboard 500 in DAST — no DB/auth in CI runner (expected)
# 10035  HSTS enforced at edge / DO App Platform, not origin
# 10038  CSP unsafe-inline required by Next.js inline styles (nonce mitigates)
# 10055  CSP managed at edge CDN layer
# 10106  DAST target is http://localhost — HTTPS enforced at edge in production
# 43     Source Code Disclosure false-positive on _next/image proxy 400 responses
# 90004  CORP header added via next.config.ts headers(); edge may strip it in transit

column3: Dashboard 500 in DAST environment — no database or auth configured in CI runner
CSP managed at edge CDN layer
DAST scans over HTTP to localhost — HTTPS enforced at the DO App Platform edge in production
False positive — _next/image proxy returns 400 for external URLs with unusual query params
Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy set in next.config.ts; may not be visible to ZAP at scan time
